content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Caisa and Pylons". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/463/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of pylons. The second line contains n integers, representing the height of each pylon.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of moves required to make all pylons have the same height.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the heights of the pylons and find the median. The minimum number of moves is the sum of the absolute differences between each height and the median.
solution.timeComplexity: O(n log n) due to sorting

code.Python3:
import sys
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
arr.sort()
median = arr[n // 2]
moves = sum(abs(x - median) for x in arr)
print(moves)
